summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Vanguard New York Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (MUNY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks the investment grade New York municipal bond market, offering tax-exempt income. It aims to provide diversified exposure to New York municipal bonds. MUNY was launched on May 20, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: S&P New York AMT-Free Municipal USD10 Million Par Bond Index

data.title: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
data.text: This week J.P. Morgan Asset Management launched two actively managed municipal bond ETFs focused on California and New York debt, offering investors a way to earn tax-free income inside a more flexibl...
